name: Cherries and Cream Parfaits
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Milk, skim, heated to boil
recipeInstructions:
1. Equally divide cake cubes and cherries into 6 (6 oz) dessert cups; set aside.
2. In a blender, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over cold milk; let stand for 2 minutes.
3. Add hot milk and process at low speed until the gelatin is completely dissolved, about 2 minutes.
4. Add cottage cheese, sugar, and extracts; process at high speed until smooth, about 2 minutes.
5. Pour the mixture over the cake into the cups; chill until set for about 30 minutes.
